markdownRemark.html:
Places I want to go:

Sapa - for treking and motocycle riding (May)

Angkor Wat- for tourism and mountian biking (May (its the slow season))

Halong Bay - for kayaking

Komodo National Park - for Diving

Bali - Beaches (June or July)

Nha Trang - Beaches (May, June or July)

Phuket - Kitesurfing (April to September)

Phong Nha-Ke Bang National Park - Caving

Tanjung Puting Nathional Park - Wildlife

frontmatter.title: Places I want to go southeast asia
